description.value:
Beginning at 3rd level, you awaken the Kisaragi Clan's latent Drive ability. Kisaragi Clan Hijutsu with, or granted, the Chain X keyword function uniquely. They do not lower or raise your current level of the Chain keyword, and mimic the level of Chain cast by your previous jutsu. Additionally, they require you to already be under the effect of Chain (min.1) in order to be cast.

Additionally, you gain a number of Heat Points equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest. Some Kisaragi Clan Hijutsu allow you to directly spend Heat Points to gain additional effects on them. These Heat Points can also be spent to do the following;
  • Spend 1 Heat Point to grant any jutsu you cast with the Water or Wind Release keyword the Chain X keyword for that cast. Jutsu modified this way are considered Kisaragi Clan Hijutsu.
 

• Spend 1 Heat Point to make an additional attack using a weapon of choice dealing 1d6 weapon damage, without adding your ability modifier, after casting a jutsu with any Chain keyword, up to 2 times per turn.
 

• Spend 2 Heat Points, after casting a jutsu with a Chain keyword, to cast a Kisaragi Hijutsu as a Bonus Action or Reaction, granting it the Chain X keyword, ignoring its casting time, and reducing the damage by 2 dice (min. 1dX).
 

• Spend 3 Heat Points, when a creature's attack would miss you, to gain an immediate reaction to cast a jutsu ignoring its casting time, or take an additional Attack action.
